spec.description: Runtime config the runner consumes. Authoritative shape: AgentSpecSchema (zod) in services/agent-shared/src/spec/spec.ts. Required: `model` (non-empty string, e.g. 'anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5'). Optional with defaults: `triggers`, `tools`, `mcps`, `skills`, `integrations`, `secrets`, `limits`, `entrypoint`, `auth`. Do NOT pass `name` / `description` here — those belong on AgentApplication, not on the revision spec.
